title: Descriptions
purpose: Train adjective agreement, colors, and possessive pronouns using only learned nouns and phrases.
uiSignature: Agreement matrix (masc, fem, neut, plural) pinned above the practice card. Noun gender badge visible early, hidden later.
subdeckRules: Teach adjective forms and possessive forms separately before combining them into noun phrases.
Invariant possessives его, её, их must be shown explicitly as invariant across all noun genders.

referenceTable.note: Use the exact adjective paradigms in this file, not a generic string-replacement heuristic, because several learned adjectives end in -ий or -ой.

subdecks.title: Possessive pronouns
subdecks.whyThisExists: The owner forms should be drilled alone before they are mixed with adjective agreement.

subdecks.title: Colors with full agreement
subdecks.whyThisExists: Color adjectives were covered heavily and need their own agreement deck.

subdecks.title: Descriptive adjective pairs
subdecks.whyThisExists: These are the high-frequency descriptive adjectives from the notes, grouped for agreement practice and noun-phrase building.

subdecks.title: Description phrase builder
subdecks.whyThisExists: Once forms are stable, the user needs phrase-level reps that combine possessives, adjective agreement, and noun gender in one phrase.

atoms.answer: Это женщина. Её рубашка белая и чёрная.
atoms.ru: Это женщина. Её рубашка белая и чёрная.
atoms.en: This is a woman. Her shirt is white and black.
Her skirt is long and light pink.

atoms.answer: Её сумка большая и розовая, но её туфли маленькие и голубые.
atoms.ru: Её сумка большая и розовая, но её туфли маленькие и голубые.
atoms.en: Her bag is big and pink, but her shoes are small and light blue.
Her glasses are dark brown. She is beautiful!

atoms.answer: У него есть глупая оранжевая сумка и штаны.
atoms.ru: У него есть глупая оранжевая сумка и штаны.
atoms.en: He has a silly orange bag and pants.

atoms.answer: У него есть длинный зелёный свитер.
atoms.ru: У него есть длинный зелёный свитер.
atoms.en: He has a long green sweater.
atoms.note: The profanity adjective from the note was removed for the default deck.

atoms.answer: У него есть маленькие белые очки.
atoms.ru: У него есть маленькие белые очки.
